summary: Tested Reverse Tactical feature (dual AI chat with Grok + Gemini), 3-tab navigation, and existing functionality. All 9 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend UI elements verified successfully.
passed_tests: GET /api/cache/status returns valid counts (leagues, teams, players, nationalTeams)
POST /api/tactical/start returns session_id and welcome message
POST /api/tactical/start with custom session_id preserves it
POST /api/tactical/message returns response with sources object (grok, gemini, liveData booleans)
POST /api/tactical/message maintains conversation context (2 messages, second references first)
POST /api/tactical/message creates session if session_id doesn't exist
Frontend: 3-tab bottom nav (Scan, Tactical, Tracking) renders correctly
Frontend: Tactical tab shows 'Reverse Tactical' header
Frontend: Tactical tab shows 'Grok + Gemini Dual Engine' label
Frontend: Tactical tab shows welcome message with GROK and GEMINI badges
Frontend: Tactical tab shows 4 quick suggestion buttons
Frontend: Tactical tab has input area with placeholder and send button
Frontend: Scan tab shows 'Scan a Prop' header with upload zone
Frontend: Tracking tab shows Live/History toggle with saved picks
critical_code_review_comments: tactical.py implements dual AI pipeline: Grok (grok-3-mini) for tactical reasoning + Gemini (gemini-2.5-flash) for synthesis
Entity extraction uses Gemini to identify players/teams from user messages, then fetches real data from cache + API-Sports
Session management stores conversation history (up to 20 exchanges) for multi-turn context
Sources object correctly reports which AI engines contributed (grok, gemini, liveData booleans)
Frontend api.js has startTactical and sendTacticalMessage functions at lines 102-114
App.js tactical state variables at lines 101-107, functions at lines 599-648, JSX at lines 2017-2169
3-tab bottom nav at lines 2174-2191 with data-testid attributes for testing
seed_data_creation: None - using existing MongoDB cache data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Reverse Tactical feature fully verified. Backend tactical endpoints work with real Grok + Gemini APIs (15-30 second response time). Frontend shows 3-tab nav (Scan/Tactical/Tracking), tactical tab has header, dual engine label, welcome message with badges, 4 suggestion buttons, and input area. All existing functionality (Scan, Tracking) still works.

backend_endpoints.POST /api/tactical/start: Returns session_id and welcome message mentioning dual AI engine
backend_endpoints.POST /api/tactical/message: Returns response with sources object {grok: bool, gemini: bool, liveData: bool}

frontend_elements.3_tab_nav: Scan, Tactical, Tracking tabs in bottom nav with data-testid attributes
frontend_elements.tactical_header: 'Reverse Tactical' with 'Grok + Gemini Dual Engine' label
frontend_elements.suggestions: 4 quick suggestion buttons for common queries
frontend_elements.input_area: Textarea with placeholder and send button

tactical_feature_verification.api_response_times: Tactical message endpoint takes 15-30 seconds due to Grok + Gemini chain
